title: Vague offer with no audience or proof (FR)
rationale: Vague offer with no defined target. Agent must flag everything as missing, NOT invent a target persona, cap scores, and produce 1-3 high-leverage follow-up questions.
notes: Stresses the no-invention rule: confidence/proof/conversion caps must hold; missing_data_categories must include proof + cta + audience.

input.raw_offer_text: J'aide les gens à mieux gérer leur entreprise.
